entity.summary: Sonic-native decentralized exchange providing concentrated and legacy liquidity pools, token swaps, farming, voting, staking, and liquidity incentives through deployed routing and pool contracts.
entity.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Shadow Exchange as a Sonic-native concentrated-liquidity exchange and links its live application. It documents swapping, concentrated and legacy liquidity, farming, voting, staking, incentives, MEV handling, and deployed router, factory, quoter, gauge, and position-management contracts. No exact launch date, legal jurisdiction, legal entity, predecessor, successor, or terminal lifecycle fact is asserted.

evidence.title: Shadow Exchange documentation overview
evidence.notes: First-party documentation describes Shadow Exchange as a concentrated-liquidity layer and exchange built on Sonic, links the public application, and documents swaps, liquidity, farming, voting, staking, incentives, and related protocol functions.

evidence.title: Shadow Exchange deployed contract addresses
evidence.notes: First-party contract registry lists current Sonic deployments including pair and concentrated-liquidity factories, routers, quoters, gauges, voting contracts, and position managers, supporting active protocol status.
